name: checkAvailability
description: Check if a table is available at the restaurant for a given date, time, and party size.

date.description: Reservation date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2026-03-15

time.description: Reservation time in HH:MM 24-hour format, e.g. 19:00

partySize.description: Number of people in the party

name: bookTable
description: Book a restaurant table reservation. Always check availability first before calling this tool.

specialRequests.description: Optional dietary restrictions or special requests

partySize.description: Number of people in the party

customerName.description: Full name of the customer making the reservation
